message:
feat(core): implement RIGHT JOIN and FULL OUTER JOIN in fallback path (bd-2ylc)

Extend execute_single_join() to track matched right-side rows and emit
NULL-padded rows for unmatched sides: LEFT+NULLs for Full, NULLs+RIGHT
for Right/Full. Five new tests covering ON, USING, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
